steps.title: Read the minimum and maximum from each box plot
steps.content:
The range of a dataset is the difference between its maximum and minimum values. Reading the whisker endpoints from the box plots:

Class A: minimum $\approx 1$, maximum $\approx 5$
Class B: minimum $\approx 2$, maximum $\approx 10$

steps.title: Calculate the range for each class
Find the positive difference between the ranges
